intro: Sieglingia eragrostoides, also known as Sea Sandwort, is a perennial plant native to coastal areas of North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties.
